title: clausia hispida
intro: Clausia hispida, also known as the hairy purslane, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Clausia hispida is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold, and treating digestive issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
